title: 2006 French Road Cycling Cup
summary: The 2006 French Road Cycling Cup was the 15th edition of the French Road Cycling Cup. It started on February 18 with the Tour du Haut Var and finished on October 5 with Paris–Bourges. Lloyd Mondory of AG2R Prévoyance won the overall competition.
text:
The 2006 French Road Cycling Cup was the 15th edition of the French Road Cycling Cup. It started on February 18 with the Tour du Haut Var and finished on October 5 with Paris–Bourges. Lloyd Mondory of AG2R Prévoyance won the overall competition.
